brand_rules.colors: Dark emerald green (#0f1a0f), deep black, rich gold (#c9a227)
brand_rules.no_text: NEVER generate text, words, letters, logos, price tags inside images
brand_rules.phone_readable: Every image must read clearly on a 6-inch phone screen

character_descriptions.lady_e_wc: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing a black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a gold chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture
character_descriptions.lucky_lou_wc: Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, wearing a green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, wide fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers with a small soccer ball sticker added, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, always holding or near a 4-leaf clover
character_descriptions.golden_dealer: Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, gold-edged card deck, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and lips, completely still, hands folded

assets.prompt: 15-second vertical 9:16 cinematic video clip. Shot: Lady E in black-and-gold referee-inspired dress standing at center of a massive dark emerald-green casino floor that blends into a soccer stadium. Movement: slow push-in as she raises a golden whistle to her lips and blows — a wave of gold coins, casino chips shaped like soccer balls, and glittering confetti explodes outward toward camera. Camera movement: slow dramatic push forward with slight upward tilt. Character action: raises whistle, blows, arms spread wide as coins cascade around her. Lighting: warm gold directional light from above catching coin rain, cinematic lens flare. Atmosphere: cinematic coin particle rain, stadium crowd ambiance implied, deep black and gold color saturation. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark emerald green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters in the video.

Cinematic split-composition feed image. Left panel: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing a black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a gold chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture — standing on a field of dark emerald turf under stadium floodlights that glow gold, posture powerful and commanding. Right panel: cascading waterfall of gold casino chips shaped like soccer balls tumbling into a dark black void with golden light at the bottom. Center dividing line: a glowing gold vertical stripe separating both panels. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above on both sides. Mood: electric, premium, match-day energy. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold color palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: wide establishing shot capturing full scene.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story image. Full-body shot. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, wearing a green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, wide fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers with a small soccer ball sticker added, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers — holding a 4-leaf clover in one hand and giving an enthusiastic thumbs up with the other. Setting: dark emerald casino lounge that blends into a stadium-style viewing area, with large glowing screens implied behind him. Foreground: scattered gold casino chips on dark floor. Lighting: warm gold overhead directional light, cinematic. Mood: excited, fun, community invitation. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium shot, slight low angle making him feel friendly and accessible.

Cinematic square 1:1 feed image. Wide shot. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing a black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a gold chain, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture — standing at grand double doors made of dark emerald wood with gold filigree handles, both arms spread wide open in a welcoming gesture, warm confident smile directed at camera. Setting: luxurious casino interior behind her, warm golden ambient glow spilling through doorway, dark green velvet walls, gold chandeliers. Foreground: ornate dark marble floor. Lighting: golden backlight framing her silhouette, warm directional front fill catching her face. Mood: welcoming, aspirational, luxury. Style: photorealistic cinematic, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: centered medium-wide shot, eye level.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic portrait story image. Close-up shot. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing a black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a gold chain, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick — looking directly into camera with a warm, knowing, confident smile. Large gold hoop earring catching warm light on right side. Foreground: subtly out-of-focus gold chip in lower corner. Background: dark emerald bokeh with gold light points. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above-left, catchlights in eyes, cinematic. Mood: personal, direct, welcoming, luxury. Style: photorealistic editorial portrait, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: close portrait, eye level, slight shallow depth of field.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story image. Medium shot. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, massive excited smile, wearing a green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, wide fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers with a small soccer ball sticker added — pumping both fists in the air in excitement, 4-leaf clover tucked into jersey pocket. Setting: dark casino lounge with large stadium-style gold-glowing screens visible behind him. Lighting: warm gold directional overhead light, excitement energy. Mood: electric pre-match fan energy, fun, communal. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium shot, slight upward tilt for energy.

Cinematic square 1:1 feed image. Dramatic wide shot. Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and strong chin, completely still, standing beside a monumental trophy shaped like a golden soccer boot mounted on a pedestal built from stacked gleaming gold casino chips — the boot glowing as if lit from within. Setting: dark casino stage, dramatic spotlight from above illuminating only the dealer and the trophy, deep black void background. Foreground: single gold casino chip on the floor catching light. Lighting: single dramatic overhead spotlight, deep shadows, Rembrandt-style contrast. Mood: exclusive, powerful, mysterious, cinematic. Style: photorealistic noir cinema, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: low-angle wide shot making the trophy and dealer monumental.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story portrait. Close-up dramatic shot. Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed revealing only a strong jaw and slightly parted lips — hand extended toward camera, palm up, a single spinning gold casino chip balanced on fingertips glowing intensely. Background: pure deep black with single cone of gold light from above. Foreground: chip glow reflecting on dark surface below. Lighting: single overhead dramatic spotlight, deep noir contrast. Mood: exclusive, urgent, powerful. Style: photorealistic cinematic noir. Color: black, gold, deep shadow. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: extreme close portrait, chin up, slight below-chin angle.

Cinematic square 1:1 feed image. Full-body shot. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, huge grin, wearing a green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, wide fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and soccer ball sticker — in a dynamic 'assist pass' pose: upper body turned left, one arm extended forward in a passing motion, 4-leaf clover in passing hand. Setting: dark emerald casino lounge blending into a penalty area — green turf patch at feet, dark casino interior behind him. Foreground: a gold casino chip rolling across the floor. Lighting: warm directional gold light, casual and friendly. Mood: fun, community, sharing energy. Style: photorealistic cinematic, dark green and gold palette. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium-wide, slightly warm lens rendering, eye-level friendly.

15-second vertical 9:16 cinematic video clip. Three-beat sequence. Male character in green-and-gold soccer jersey and sticker-covered fishing hat celebrates three consecutive jackpot moments. Beat 1 (0-4s): Lucky Lou punches the air as first slot machine behind him lights up gold. Beat 2 (4-9s): second slot machine explodes with gold coins as he spins around arms wide. Beat 3 (9-15s): third machine hits jackpot — massive gold coin explosion, he drops to his knees in a soccer celebration knee-slide across a dark casino floor covered in glittering coins, arms outstretched, hat nearly flying off. Camera movement: cut between three angles — medium, wide, close reaction face. Lighting: warm gold spotlight intensifying with each hit. Atmosphere: coins, confetti, slot light flashes. Style: photorealistic cinematic, high energy. Color: dark green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters.

Cinematic square 1:1 feed image. Wide shot. Group of 4-5 diverse players — men and women of various ethnicities, ages 20s-40s, casually dressed in gold and green accents — arms around each other, faces lit with pure joy, gold confetti raining down on them from above. Setting: luxurious casino interior with stadium-scale energy — dark emerald walls, chandeliers, casino floor in background. Foreground: scattered gold chips and soccer-ball-shaped chips on dark marble. Lighting: warm overhead gold spotlight catching the confetti, lens flare artistically applied. Mood: inclusive, celebratory, community, post-match energy. Style: photorealistic cinematic, magazine editorial. Color: dark green, black, gold confetti. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: wide group shot, slight warm color grade, eye level.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story image. Dynamic shot. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, in black and gold striped referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on chain, gold crown headpiece, bronze-brown skin, crimson lips — standing beside a glowing oversized vertical slot/bonus wheel made of dark green and gold segments, one arm dramatically pointing at it, other hand on hip, expression urgent and commanding. Wheel is actively blurred as if spinning at speed, gold light radiating from segments. Setting: dark casino interior, deep black behind. Lighting: dramatic mixed lighting — wheel glow and overhead gold spotlight combining on her. Mood: urgent, exciting, deadline energy. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark green, black, gold glow. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium shot, slight low angle capturing her and the wheel.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story portrait. Close-medium shot. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, in black and gold striped referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on chain, gold crown headpiece, bronze-brown skin, crimson lips — raising one finger as if marking the final count, other wrist turned to show a gleaming gold watch face. Direct eye contact with camera, expression calm and authoritative. Background: deep dark green-black bokeh with warm gold light points. Foreground: subtle gold sheen on surface below. Lighting: warm directional gold light from upper left, dramatic Rembrandt shadows. Mood: final call, authoritative, premium. Style: photorealistic editorial portrait. Color: dark green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium-close portrait, eye level, slight shallow depth of field.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story image. Dramatic close-up. Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat face partially shadowed — one hand raised, palm open, a single golden casino chip spinning and levitating above his palm, glowing intensely with gold light. The chip is motion-blurred from spin, emitting golden light particles upward. Background: absolute black with a single cone of light from directly above. Foreground: golden light pooling on surface below his hand. Lighting: single high-contrast overhead dramatic spotlight, deep noir shadows. Mood: mystery, exclusive, midnight energy, drop announcement. Style: photorealistic cinematic noir. Color: black, gold, pure shadow. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: extreme close dramatic angle, slightly below the hand, upward tilt.

15-second vertical 9:16 cinematic video clip. Golden Hour finale sequence. Male character in green-and-gold soccer jersey, sticker-covered fishing hat, now with a gold championship scarf draped around shoulders — pulls a slot machine lever in dramatic slow motion. Reels spin and land on triple gold. Jackpot explodes: massive wave of gold coins pours from machine filling the floor. He drops to knees in an iconic soccer celebration knee-slide across a casino floor shimmering with gold coins and confetti, arms wide, head back, expression of pure joy and disbelief. Camera movement: starts on his face in close-up, pulls back wide to reveal the full coin explosion. Lighting: golden celebration lighting intensifying to maximum warmth, almost cinematic overexposure on coin rain. Atmosphere: coins, confetti, victory energy. Style: photorealistic cinematic, high-energy. Color: dark green, gold, black. No text, no words, no letters.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic story image. Atmospheric wide-to-medium shot from behind. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, in black and gold striped referee-inspired dress, gold crown headpiece visible from behind in natural dark hair, long black gloves — standing at the far end of a grand casino floor looking out over glowing machines and golden ambient light, posture completely still and commanding. Setting: luxury casino at near-closing, warm gold light glowing from machines and chandeliers, dark emerald walls, a few silhouetted players in deep background. Foreground: dark marble floor reflecting warm gold from machines. Lighting: dramatic warm gold ambient glow, no overhead spotlight — softer, mysterious. Mood: reflective, mysterious, aspirational tomorrow energy. Style: photorealistic cinematic, moody. Color: dark green, black, warm gold ambient. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: shot from behind at medium-wide distance, low angle looking into the casino floor.

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Music: Original song 'Golden Kick'. Genre: Afrobeats / Trap Fusion. BPM: 105. Key: F# Minor. Instruments: Afrobeats percussion pattern, trap hi-hats, deep 808 bass, gold shimmer synth lead, stadium crowd ambiance bed, horn stabs on chorus. Emotion: Triumphant, celebratory, confident, community anthem. Pacing: Steady 105 BPM Afrobeats feel — infectious groove. Notes: Lady E as lead vocalist with rich confident delivery. Full song structure: Intro → Verse 1 → Pre-Chorus → Chorus → Verse 2 → Bridge → Final Chorus → Outro. Production quality: polished radio-ready. World Cup anthem energy meets casino luxury brand. Lyrics: see storyline.json song_of_the_day.lyrics

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'The final whistle has blown. The world celebrated. And now — Golden Hour begins at Lady E Luck. The Halftime Reload is live. One night only. Come claim what's yours.' Emotion: Warm, commanding, confident, exclusive. Pacing: Measured and deliberate — slight dramatic pause after 'The world celebrated.' Notes: Vesper delivery — low resonance, authoritative but inviting. No music under — pure voice, room reverb only. Perfect for Story or Reel voiceover overlay.

Voice: Lucky Lou. Preset: Leo. Voice ID: 73a45c18-0c56-4642-a61e-f6b303f8ded1. Text: 'Hey! You watching the match? Good — because I just sent my buddy the referral code and we BOTH got a free spin. REF-MATCHDAY-847. Pass it like an assist — you both score!' Emotion: Excited, fun, inclusive, buddy energy. Pacing: Fast and enthusiastic — big grin in the voice. Notes: Leo delivery — warm baritone with energy. Light crowd ambiance bed suggested. Perfect for Reel or Groups video overlay.
